title: Biel、Bern — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Biel、Bernの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

BielはBernにある人口55,000の都市です。A bilingual German-French city at the foot of the Jura Mountains, known for its watchmaking industry, the Omega and Swatch headquarters, and the annual Biel Festival.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
